side_effects.description: Burning/stinging at time of injection in thigh, soreness lasting hours to full day after injection, bruises and lumps under skin lasting up to 5 days

protocol_notes: Pharmacy-compounded KLOW, does not reconstitute. Injecting in thigh due to habit from prior GLP-1 shot. Taking zinc to help with injection site reactions. Injecting slowly. SO injects in stomach with no reaction.
